form.formComment: First up. At the last run he 9th (25m) over 2650m at Oraison beaten 43m by Kabardino in 5yo gelding handicap on September 28. Finds a nice race to launch the campaign.

form.formComment: Last start disqualified at Chatillon-Chalaronne on March 30 over 2675m. Before that, 6th over 2600m at Saint-Galmier, beaten 8.1m by King De Bassiere in 6yo race on March 12 at $3.90. Will give a good account.

form.formComment: Last start 5th over 2600m at Cavaillon, beaten 18m by Justagigolo Sallaz in 6-10yo amateur drivers handicap on March 29. At his previous start good run when 3rd over 2600m at Chatillon-Chalaronne, beaten 5.2m by Jolly Look in 6-9yo amateur drivers on March 16. Sure to be about the mark.

form.formComment: Disqualified last start at Paray-le-Monial and prior disqualifed. Wait for a solid performance before backing.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last start, 10th (25m) over 2600m at Cavaillon, beaten 59m by Jolie Costardiere in 7-10yo amateur drivers handicap on March 1. Before that 7th over 2000m at Saint-Galmier beaten 33m by Jenjoy Maybe in 7-11yo amateur drivers on February 16 at $95. Recent form suggests he needs to lift.

form.formComment: Comes here second-up after five-and-a-half weeks. Lacklustre first-up performance when 12th (25m) over 2675m at Chatillon-Chalaronne beaten 82m by Krak De Bussieres in 6-7yo handicap on March 1. Rough place hope at the very best.

form.formComment: Capable of better than we have seen lately. Last start disqualified at Chatillon-Chalaronne on March 30 over 2675m. The run previous 6th over 3000m at Marseille-Borely beaten 9.4m by Invisible Sam in 8-11yo handicap on March 13 at $15. Good enough to turn things around.

form.formComment: Improved last start with a good run when 2nd over 2300m at Marseille-Borely, beaten 20m by Isba Besnot in 7-11yo amateur drivers on March 13 at $2. Progressing well. Top prospects.

formComments.comment: Improved last start with a good run when 2nd over 2300m at Marseille-Borely, beaten 20m by Isba Besnot in 7-11yo amateur drivers on March 13 at $2. Progressing well. Top prospects.

form.formComment: Fair performance when beaten by 5.4m finishing second behind Jurae Vet at Lyon-la-Soie over 2700m in a 7-11yo handicap on February 26 at $32. Then a handy effort when beaten by 1.4m finishing second behind Ines Griff at Paray-le-Monial over 2625m in a 7-9yo handicap on March 22. In fine form. Winning hope.
